app.name: Volodin Family Book
app.tagline: Our living room, not the mall

auth.check_email: Check your email for the login link
auth.invite_welcome: Welcome to the Volodin Family Book

common.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

trips.title: My Trips
trips.subtitle: Shared photo albums from family adventures
trips.no_trips_hint: Create a trip album and invite family to share photos together
trips.description_placeholder: A few words about this trip...
trips.no_photos_hint: Upload photos or add existing moments to this trip
trips.no_gps: No GPS-tagged photos in this trip yet.
trips.invite_hint: Share this link or QR code with family members:
trips.revoke_confirm: Revoke the invite link? Anyone with the old link won't be able to join.
trips.delete_confirm: Delete this trip? This cannot be undone.
trips.join_hint: Join to share photos and see everyone's moments from this trip.
trips.join_already: You're already part of this trip!

landing.hero_title: Claim your family archive before it becomes another generic app.
landing.hero_subtitle: Start with your family name, preferred language, and a look that feels like home. This install should belong to your family from the first page.
landing.bullet_private: Private by default, with invite-led access instead of a public feed.
landing.bullet_invites: Set the language and then invite relatives into a space that already feels familiar.
landing.bullet_keep: Keep your files, tree, and memories on your own server — not trapped in someone else's roadmap.
landing.claim_path: Make this install yours before you invite anyone else.
landing.setup_hint: Pick the family name and accent you want new relatives to see first. You can refine the rest once you're inside.
landing.onboard_cta: Already the steward of this archive? Continue to sign-in and claim the private space.
landing.feature_private_desc: The first-run path should feel like setting up a home, not walking into a public social network.
landing.feature_tree_desc: Switch language immediately and keep the interface close to the family's real linguistic life.
landing.feature_invite_desc: Claim the archive, choose the tone, then bring in relatives through invite-led onboarding instead of generic sign-up funnels.
landing.footer_line: A private family archive, shaped before the first invitation goes out.
